message:
fix(mermaid): fix multi-agent merge artifacts and rendering bugs

Code review fixes:
- Remove triple-nested annotation detection dead code in class member
  parsing (merge drift from 3 agents touching same code path)
- Remove duplicate node index remap block that double-remapped sequence
  activation/note indices, causing wrong lifeline assignments when
  pre-sort and post-sort indices collide
- Remove duplicate C4 rendering check (dead code from merge drift)
- Add Gantt early-return in legacy render() method for consistency
  with render_with_plan()
- Fix render_removed_legend Unicode width: use cumulative display
  width instead of char index for x-position (CJK correctness)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
